notableMoments: Only World Cup appearance was in 1974 as Zaire (former name of DR Congo)
Lost all three group matches: Scotland 0-2, Yugoslavia 0-9, Brazil 0-3
The 0-9 defeat to Yugoslavia remains the joint-worst World Cup loss
Ilunga Mwepu's infamous free kick incident against Brazil in 1974 is part of World Cup folklore
Won the Africa Cup of Nations in 1968 and 1974 as Zaire
Returning to the World Cup after a 52-year absence
